headline: CFOs On the Move: Week ending April 17
summary: Kenvue makes a CFO change amid its Kimberly-Clark transaction, FedEx’s finance chief is stepping down and Cineverse names a new chief financial officer.

headline: Kenvue: Extremely Mature Merger Target Is Too Expensive
summary: Kenvue struggles post-IPO under $9B spin-off debt; its KMB merger plan faces skepticism despite strong brands and cash flow. Read this KVUE stock analysis.
